headline: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Launches BidBoardX To Make Freight Matching Easier
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide launched BidBoardX, a new digital freight platform for carriers and shippers. The platform is designed to streamline freight bidding and matching in a single, user friendly interface. BidBoardX aims to reduce manual processes in freight management and broaden access to load opportunities. C.H. Robinson Worldwide, traded as NasdaqGS:CHRW, is putting fresh attention on digital tools with the rollout of BidBoardX. The stock closed at $185.04, with the share price up...
